# Mantosh Kumar

Canonical URL: https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/

Mantosh Kumar is a Staff Software Engineer publishing documented engineering projects and case studies.

His résumé-backed capabilities include engineering platforms and automation, Python backend and data systems, networking and distributed validation, observability, quality analytics, and AI-assisted engineering tools.

## Publicly documented work

- Privacy-conscious browser-side image processing
- Local Python workflow automation for PDF, image, and file tasks
- Inspectable Python and Streamlit trigger-price calculations with explicit rule-freshness limits
- Engineering leverage through reusable systems, delegated ownership, and explicit workflow design

## Ask Mantosh

Ask Mantosh is an AI interface to Mantosh's published engineering knowledge. It is intended to answer from documented public work and provide source links when available.
